We represent more than 200 globally recognized thought leaders, including bestselling authors, former CEOs, economists, technologists, scientists, policymakers, and leading academics, many of whom are among the most sought-after experts in their fields and regularly advise senior executives, boards, investors, and governments around the world.<br><br>Our clients include Fortune 500 companies, global financial institutions, major associations, executive leadership teams, and leading conferences. We help organizations navigate leadership, AI, innovation, organizational transformation, economic uncertainty, and other critical business challenges.<br><br>What makes Stern unique is the caliber of expertise we exclusively represent. Our roster includes some of the world芒聙聶s most influential thinkers and practitioners whose ideas shape executive agendas, inform strategic decisions, and help organizations prepare for what芒聙聶s next.<br><br><strong>The Role<br><br></strong>This is a quota-carrying Account Executive role responsible for both new business development and account growth.<br><br>You will manage a portfolio of speakers while developing relationships with clients across corporations, associations, and conferences. Success in this role requires balancing inbound opportunity conversion, proactive outbound business development, speaker management, and long-term account growth.<br><br>This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building relationships, engaging with senior executives, learning new ideas, and helping organizations connect business challenges with world-class expertise.<br><br><strong>What You芒聙聶ll discovery, opportunity qualification, and expert matching.</li><li>Prospect into target accounts through outreach, referrals, networking, industry events, and social selling.</li><li>Develop relationships with senior decision-makers across corporations, associations, and conferences.</li><li>Expand existing client relationships by identifying new stakeholders, business units, and opportunities.</li><li>Serve as the primary relationship manager for an assigned portfolio of speakers.</li><li>Develop a deep understanding of your speakers芒聙聶 expertise, positioning, and commercial successful engagement execution.</li><li>Maintain CRM discipline, forecast accurately, and collaborate closely with marketing, operations, and leadership teams.<br><br></li></ul><strong>What We芒聙聶re consultative solutions, expertise, professional services, executive education, advisory services, talent, research, or other high-value offerings.</li><li>Experience engaging senior stakeholders such as CEOs, CHROs, Chief Learning Officers, Leadership Development leaders, Strategy executives, Innovation leaders, Private Equity operating partners, and conference or association Education, Expert Networks, Executive Search, Enterprise SaaS, Media, Events, or Speakers Bureaus.<br><br><strong>Compensation &amp; Structure<br><br></strong>We offer a competitive base salary plus business.<br><br><strong>Pay Ranges<br><br></strong><ul><li>New York and San Francisco: Base $90,000 芒聙聯 $120,000, plus incentive(s)</li><li>London: Base 脗拢65,000 芒聙聯 脗拢90,000, plus incentive(s)<br><br></li></ul>This is a fully remote position. Travel to client meetings, conferences, and speaker engagements is expected periodically.<br><br>This job description outlines the primary responsibilities and qualifications for the role. It is not exhaustive, and responsibilities may evolve as Stern continues to grow..<br><br><strong>Wondering about our benefits?<br><br></strong>We are a fully remote workforce. We offer two health insurance plans, life insurance, long and short-term disability benefits, 401(k) with up to a 4% match, dependent care flex spending account, self-funded dental, vision, cancer and accident, an Employee Assistance Program, funded learning opportunities, unlimited PTO, and 10 company-paid holidays per year. Company name and additional details will be shared with qualified candidates as the process progresses.</p><p><br></p><p>Details below...</p><p><br></p><p><strong>VP of Supply Chain</strong></p><p>Location: California or New York (on-site/regional travel required)</p><p>Reports To: President / Executive Leadership</p><p><br></p><p><strong>About the Company</strong></p><p>Our client is a large, fast-growing logistics and distribution platform operating a third-party logistics (3PL) model 芒聙聰 point-to-point pick-and-pack combined with wholesale buy-sell operations, similar in structure to beverage alcohol or CPG distribution. The company operates multiple warehouse locations across California and New York, moves a high volume of units monthly, and processes well over $1 billion in annual wholesale transaction value.
